title: Access Denied
content:
I can hardly access the company's online server from the office. (But I can access my personal server just fine.)

I can hardly access my personal online server from home. (But I can access the company's server just fine.)

Maybe I have to start working from home once again. --"

[ According to the news, it takes approximately 3-5 weeks to fix the broken underwater backbone. Maybe this is the time I start writing a plan for my 'dream bakery'. ]
